story.title: Trump and Xi to meet in Beijing: The key issues shaping the China summit
story.summary: Trump and Xi meet as trade, Taiwan and the Iran war dominate a high-stakes US-China summit.
story.selection_reason: The meeting between Trump and Xi has the potential to impact global trade, geopolitics, and international relations, making it the most globally significant and high-impact story.
